## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO improvements, and website development.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Directory/showcase page for content is a priority; design and implementation plans discussed](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on model-specific articles and repository development](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Website improvements needed for better SEO, including blog structure and navigation changes](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Exploring partnership with WebStacks for website development](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

## Topics

### Content Directory/Showcase Page

  - [Priority to create a directory/showcase page for better content discoverability and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Initial MVP to include basic grid layout with titles and brief descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Future iterations to include tagging, search functionality, and improved UX](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Design to be handled by Vapi team (Anna), implementation by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [43 editorial pages live, 13 indexed; 100 programmatic pages live, 2 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Focusing on stabilizing 50 live pages by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Recommendation to pause increasing publishing volume until directory page is live](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Exploring creation of model repository for LLMs and voice models](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Suggestion to validate ideas through blog posts before creating dedicated sections](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

### Website Improvements

  - [Need to improve blog structure for better crawlability (e.g., dynamic URLs for categories)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Rethinking navigation to prioritize dedicated pages over jump links](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Considering creation of topic pages for tags and categories](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Exploring ways to highlight company announcements without burying other content](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Benchmarking and Model Comparisons

  - [Discussed potential for creating benchmarks or comparisons for voice models](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=2440.0)
  - [Challenges in establishing credible benchmarks for LLMs and voice models noted](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on human preference testing as a simpler alternative](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

### Website Development

  - [Considering partnership with WebStacks for website development](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing SEO considerations with development choices](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create MVP of directory/showcase page (Vapi design team, GrowthX implementation)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Update Airtable with statuses of published and manually indexed pages (GrowthX team)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Share data on popular models used on Vapi platform for content prioritization (Vapi team)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
  - [Explore creation of model repository, starting with blog post validation (GrowthX team)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Marcel to send example of IDE collection and make intro to WebStacks (Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide recap of meeting and action items (GrowthX team)](https://fathom.video/share/Jzp3qDyxhLcpv_puPebe_VZEsMzAXrso?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)
